item.name: Enbarr Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a shrill tone that is said to summon Enbarr, the steed of legend.

mount.name: Enbarr
mount.action: Summon forth Enbarr, the legendary steed favored of the primal Leviathan. It is said to have been born of the surging waves.
mount.description: Legend states that the Lord of the Whorl, Leviathan, birthed this magicked steed from a nightmare offered by the Sahagin in sacrifice.
mount.tooltip:
Nay is but a hoofbeat
away from neigh!
- Uma Bugyo
